name: Web Tools
description: Domain health monitoring — DNS, SSL, HTTP headers grade, blacklist 30 DNSBL, WHOIS, SEO, email SPF/DMARC/DKIM, geo probes from 4 regions, port scans, SMTP test, recurring automated monitors with alerts.

tools.name: tool_web_tools_chat
tools.description: Web diagnostics — DNS, SSL, WHOIS, HTTP headers grade, email SPF DMARC DKIM, blacklist 30 DNSBL, port scan, SMTP test, geo probe EU/US/SG/MD, full parallel domain audit, domain health monitors with groups and check profiles

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_web_tools
tools.description: Background refresh: domain monitor statuses from last scan snapshots.

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: DNS record lookup — A/AAAA/MX/NS/TXT/CNAME/SRV/DNSSEC, global propagation across 15+ resolvers, direct authoritative NS query. Use for any DNS question.

tools.name: ssl_check
tools.description: SSL/TLS certificate — expiry date, days remaining, issuer, grade A-F. Full mode adds chain, SANs, fingerprint and TLS version support.

tools.name: whois_lookup
tools.description: WHOIS for domain (registrar, dates, nameservers, status) or IP (ASN, org, country). Use detail= for targeted sections: quick/full/dates/registrar/availability.

tools.name: http_check
tools.description: HTTP security headers grade A+ to F (HSTS/CSP/X-Frame-Options/X-Content-Type-Options). Shows missing headers with fix tips, redirect chain, response time.

tools.name: network_check
tools.description: Network diagnostics — ICMP ping (RTT/loss), MTR traceroute per-hop, reverse DNS (PTR), IP geolocation + ASN, ASN WHOIS prefix list.

tools.name: seo_check
tools.description: SEO check — meta title/description length and issues, robots.txt rules, sitemap.xml validation, Google indexing status. Use check_type to target a specific area.

tools.name: email_check
tools.description: Email authentication — SPF/DMARC/DKIM/BIMI checks or combined A-F grade, trace raw email headers to find originating IP, generate SPF or DMARC records.

tools.name: blacklist_check
tools.description: Spam blacklist check — IP against 30 DNSBL lists (Spamhaus, SpamCop, Barracuda) or domain against SURBL. Returns verdict: clean / listed / critical.

tools.name: port_scan
tools.description: TCP port check — single port status (open/closed/filtered) or preset scan: web (80/443/8080/8443), mail (25/587/465/993/995), database (3306/5432/6379), all.

tools.name: smtp_test
tools.description: SMTP server test — connects via MX record or direct host, verifies EHLO/STARTTLS/AUTH support, reads server banner. Use to diagnose email delivery problems.

tools.name: geo_check
tools.description: Multi-region probe from EU/US/SG/MD — DNS resolution + anycast mismatch, ping latency, HTTP availability, SSL validity, MTR traceroute, independently per region.

tools.name: domain_full_check
tools.description: Complete domain audit — runs DNS+SSL+WHOIS+HTTP+email+blacklist+geo in parallel in one call. Use when user asks for full site health, domain report or audit.

tools.name: create_domain_group
tools.description: Create a named group of domains for monitoring (max 5 groups, max 20 domains each). Required before creating a monitor with create_monitor

tools.name: update_domain_group
tools.description: Add, remove or replace domains in an existing group, or rename it (max 20 domains). Use list_domain_groups first to get the group_id

tools.name: list_domain_groups
tools.description: Show all domain groups — names, domain lists and domain count. Call before create_monitor to pick the right group_id.

tools.name: delete_domain_group
tools.description: Permanently delete a domain group and cascade-delete all monitors that use it. Cannot be undone — confirm group_id with list_domain_groups first.

tools.name: create_monitor
tools.description: Create a domain health monitor — saves a wt_monitors record that runs DNS/SSL/HTTP/email checks on a domain group at a recurring interval. Requires an existing domain group (group_id) and check profile (profile_id). NOT an automation rule. Max 5 monitors

tools.name: list_monitors
tools.description: Show all domain health monitors — name, group, check profile, scan interval and last scan time. Use to find monitor_id for run_scan or update_monitor.

tools.name: update_monitor
tools.description: Rename a monitor or change its scan interval. Does not change domains or checks — use update_domain_group or update_check_profile for that.

tools.name: delete_monitor
tools.description: Delete a monitor. The domain group and check profile are preserved and can be reused.

tools.name: create_monitor_full
tools.description: Create a complete health monitor in one step — name, domains, check types and interval. Atomically creates group + profile + monitor. Prefer this over create_monitor.

tools.name: create_check_profile
tools.description: Create a check profile — defines which checks (ssl/http/email/blacklist/geo/whois/dns) run per domain in a monitor (max 5 profiles, max 5 checks each)

tools.name: list_check_profiles
tools.description: Show all check profiles — names and enabled check types. Call before create_monitor to pick the right profile_id.

tools.name: update_check_profile
tools.description: Rename a check profile or replace its check type list. Use list_check_profiles first to get the profile_id.

tools.name: delete_check_profile
tools.description: Permanently delete a check profile and all monitors that use it. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: run_scan
tools.description: Trigger an immediate scan for a monitor — checks all domains in parallel, stores a new snapshot. Use when user says 'scan now', 'run now' or 'refresh monitor'.

tools.name: get_scan_results
tools.description: Get the latest scan snapshot for a monitor — per-domain per-check verdict (ok/warning/critical), overall status and counts. Use list_monitors to find the monitor_id.

tools.name: quick_check
tools.description: Single-domain quick check from the panel — choose preset (full/dns/ssl/http/email/blacklist/geo/ports). Result replaces left panel. Use for ad-hoc checks without a monitor.

tools.name: run_scan_tool
tools.description: Bulk domain scan (max 10) with chosen checks via toggles — results appear in the left panel. Use when user provides a list of domains to check simultaneously.

tools.name: run_ip_scan
tools.description: Bulk IP scan (max 5) — geolocation + ASN, 29 DNSBL blacklist, reverse DNS (PTR), open ports, ping from EU/US/SG/MD. Use for IP-specific investigations.

tools.name: get_panel_data
tools.description: Panel data helper — returns counts and statuses for monitors, groups and profiles. Called by the panel on load; not needed in regular LLM chat.

tools.name: __panel__sidebar
tools.description: Panel left: Domain Scan and IP Scan (tab buttons). TagInput domains, toggle checks, expandable results per domain/IP with rich detail.

tools.name: __panel__overview
tools.description: Panel right: monitors — stats, bar chart, sorted cards. view=monitors (default) or view=new (New Monitor form with toggles).

tools.name: __panel__detail
tools.description: Panel right: monitor detail — pie chart, expandable domain list (per-check KV), Settings accordion.

schedules.name: wt_monitor_runner
schedules.description: Hourly: runs overdue domain health monitors across all users
